task_completion.description: Verify the agent logged into the system using the provided credentials.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main dashboard or home screen of the medical/EHR system is visible, indicating a successful login (often showing 'admin' as the user).

task_completion.description: Verify the correct patient's chart is opened.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The patient header or active chart displays the name 'Isabella Margarita Gonzalez' and DOB '1961-05-08'.

task_completion.description: Verify the encounter vitals form has been accessed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A form or section explicitly titled 'Vitals', 'Encounter Vitals', or similar is open and ready for data entry.

task_completion.description: Verify the pain score of 7 is entered.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The number '7' is typed into a form field labeled 'Pain', 'Pain Score', 'Severity', or similar within the vitals form.

task_completion.description: Verify the pain location details are entered.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Text mentioning 'lower back', 'lumbar', and/or 'radiating to the left leg' is entered into a 'Location' or relevant notes field.

task_completion.description: Verify the pain quality details are entered.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Text mentioning 'aching' and 'sharp shooting' is entered into a 'Quality', 'Description', or relevant notes field.

task_completion.description: Verify the pain assessment has been recorded/saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save' button has been clicked resulting in a success confirmation message, or the entered vitals are now visible in a read-only summary table/list for the patient's encounter.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the graphical user interface to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser or EHR application interface being used, rather than terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the interaction occurred within the actual medical application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface contains standard EHR navigation menus, patient search bars, and clinical forms, rather than a plain text editor or mock HTML page.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the output.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser's developer tools (Inspect Element, Console) are not open, and the data appears to be entered naturally into the form fields.
